text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Internet Information Resources * Parenting Issues 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AMERICAN ACADEMY OF PEDIATRICS PARENTING EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on parenting, child development, health, learning, and safety and prevention. 345 Park Boulevard Itasca, IL 60143 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION MILESTONES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an app that tracks child development milestones and provides guidance for early action if concerns arise. 1600 Clifton Road Atlanta, GA 30329 Eligibility: Birth to age 5 Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOSTERCLUB FOSTER PARENT ONLINE TRAINING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The online training is a subscription-based service offering interactive educational modules for credit to resource parents, supportive adults, and child welfare professionals. To confirm if earned credits are accepted, contact your local agency. 620 S Holladay Drive #1 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Resource parents, supportive adults and/or child welfare professionals Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details PARENTING NOW PARENTING RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website provides parenting articles, a newsletter, and links to family resource information. 86 Centennial Loop Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-8 Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOSTERCLUB FOSTER PARENT ONLINE TRAINING PARENTING NOW PARENTING RESOURCES
